{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Anguilla women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=December 2023}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                  = Anguilla
| Badge                 = Anguilla Football Association (2020).png
| Badge_size            = 194px
| Nickname              = 
| Association           = [[Anguilla Football Association]] (AFA)
| Confederation         = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach                 = [[Keith Jeffrey]]
| Captain               = [[Germain Hughes]]
| Most caps             = [[Germain Hughes]] (36)<ref>{{cite web | title=Germain Hughes - Soccer Stats, Profile & Career Info &#124; Global Sports Archive | url=https://globalsportsarchive.com/people/soccer/germain-hughes/59046/ }}</ref>
| Top scorer            = [[Girdon Connor]]<br>Richard O'Connor<br>Terrence Rogers (5)
| Home Stadium          = [[Raymond E. Guishard Technical Centre]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = AIA
| FIFA Rank             = {{nowrap|{{FIFA World Rankings|AIA}}}}
| FIFA max              = 189
| FIFA max date         = June–September 1997
| FIFA min              = 210
| FIFA min date         = November 2019, March 2022, June 2026
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Anguilla}}
| Elo max               = 195
| Elo max date          = 1985
| Elo min               = 234
| Elo min date          = 2017
| pattern_la1           = 
| pattern_b1            = _aia21rh
| pattern_ra1           = 
| pattern_sh1           = 
| pattern_so1           = 
| leftarm1              = FF8B00
| body1                 = 
| rightarm1             = FF8B00
| shorts1               = 0D0C6B
| socks1                = 0D0C6B
| body2                 = 
| pattern_la2           = 
| pattern_ra2           = 
| pattern_sh2           = 
| pattern_b2            = _aia21h
| pattern_so2           = 
| leftarm2              = 
| rightarm2             = 
| shorts2               = 15b1c7
| socks2                = FFFFFF
| pattern_la3           = _AIA2021THIRD
| pattern_b3            = _AIA2021THIRD
| pattern_ra3           = _AIA2021THIRD
| pattern_sh3           = 
| pattern_so3           = 
| leftarm3              = 
| body3                 = 
| rightarm3             = 
| shorts3               = 1F7FD5
| socks3                = 0D0C6B
| First game            = {{fb|Anguilla}} 0–1 {{fb-rt|British Virgin Islands}}<br>([[The Valley, Anguilla|The Valley]], Anguilla; October 1985)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://eloratings.net/Anguilla|title=Elo Ratings: Anguilla|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=16 April 2019|archive-date=24 March 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190324175327/http://www.eloratings.net/Anguilla|url-status=live}}</ref>
| Largest win           = {{fb|Anguilla}} 4–1 {{fb-rt|Montserrat}}<br>([[Marigot, Saint Martin|Marigot]], Saint Martin; 8 February 2001)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|TRI}} 15–0 {{fb-rt|Anguilla}}<br>([[Couva]], Trinidad and Tobago; 10 November 2019)
| Regional name         = 
| Regional cup apps     = 
| Regional cup first    = 
| Regional cup best     = 
}} 

The '''Anguilla national football team''' represents [[Anguilla]] ([[British Overseas Territories|British overseas territory]]) in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Anguilla Football Association]] founded in 1990. It has been a member of [[FIFA]] since 1996, an associate member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1994 and becoming a full member in 1996. Regionally, it is a member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone.

Anguilla has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]] and the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]], but has participated four times in League C of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]], achieving its first victory in the [[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2024–25 edition]].

Anguilla's debut in international competitions was in the [[1991 Caribbean Cup#Qualifying tournament|1991 Caribbean Cup qualifying tournament]]. Their first appearance in World Cup qualifiers was in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2002 CONCACAF qualification]]. The team achieved its first victory in 2000, defeating [[British Virgin Islands national football team|British Virgin Islands]] 4–3.

==History==
===2002 World Cup qualification===
Anguilla entered the [[FIFA World Cup qualification|World Cup qualifiers]] for the first time for the [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002 World Cup]] in [[South Korea]] and [[Japan]].

In the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF Caribbean Zone#Group 3|first round]] of the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|qualifiers]], Anguilla were drawn against the [[Bahamas national football team|Bahamas]]. On 5 March 2000, Anguilla hosted the first leg in front of 250 people at [[Webster Park]] in [[The Valley, Anguilla|The Valley]], losing by a scoreline of 3–1. In front of a Bahamian crowd of just 330, the second leg was played at the [[Thomas Robinson Stadium]] in [[Nassau, Bahamas|Nassau]] on 19 March 2000, with Anguilla losing 2–1, and thereby eliminated by an aggregate scoreline of 5–2.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Bahamas – List of International Matches|url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesb/bahama-intres.html}}</ref>

===2006 World Cup qualification===

During the [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification|qualifiers]] for the [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006 World Cup]] in [[Germany]], Anguilla faced the [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] in the [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]]. The first leg was played to a goalless draw at the [[Estadio Olímpico Juan Pablo Duarte]] in [[Santo Domingo]] on 19 March 2004. Newly introduced FIFA stadium requirements forced Anguilla to play their "home" leg at the same Dominican Republic stadium two days later, with the Dominican Republic winning the second leg and thus the first round by a scoreline of 6–0.

===2010 World Cup qualification===

During the [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification|qualifiers]] for the [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010 World Cup]] in [[South Africa]], Anguilla was drawn against [[El Salvador national football team|El Salvador]] in the [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]]. On 6 February 2008, they lost 12–0 at the [[Estadio Cuscatlán]] in [[San Salvador]], where striker [[Rudis Corrales]] scored five times and [[Ronald Cerritos]] three. This time, Anguilla played their "home leg" at [[RFK Stadium]] in [[Washington, D.C.]] in the [[United States]] on 26 March 2008. In front of 22,670 spectators, Anguilla lost the second leg 4–0, thereby losing to El Salvador by an aggregate score of 16–0.

===2014 World Cup qualification===

In the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]] of the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|qualifiers]] for the [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014 World Cup]] in [[Brazil]], Anguilla were again drawn to play the Dominican Republic, as they had eight years previously. On 8 July 2011, they lost 2–0 at the [[Estadio Panamericano, San Cristóbal|Estadio Panamericano]] in [[San Cristóbal, Dominican Republic|San Cristobal]], and losing 4–0 in the same Dominican Republic stadium just two days later. This put the Dominican Republic through to the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round|second round]] with the same 6–0 aggregate scoreline as their previous encounter.

===2018 World Cup qualification===

In the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]] of the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|qualifiers]] for the [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018 World Cup]] in [[Russia]], Anguilla were drawn to play [[Nicaragua national football team|Nicaragua]]. On 23 March 2015, they lost the first leg 5–0 at the [[Dennis Martínez National Stadium|Estadio Nacional Dennis Martínez]] in [[Managua]], [[Nicaragua]] and, on 29 March 2015, were eliminated at [[Ronald Webster Park]] in [[The Valley, Anguilla|The Valley]] in Anguilla with a 3–0 loss, to send Nicaragua through to the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round|second round]] by a score of 8–0 on aggregate.

===2022 World Cup qualification===

In the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]] of the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|qualifiers]] for the [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022 World Cup]] in [[Qatar]], Anguilla were drawn into group D with [[Dominica national football team|Dominica]], [[Barbados national football team|Barbados]], [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]], and [[Panama national football team|Panama]], whom they’d each play once. Their first match of the campaign was against Dominican Republic on 27 March 2021, at the [[DRV PNK Stadium]] in [[Fort Lauderdale, Florida|Fort Lauderdale]]. This game would make it the 3rd time the two teams faced in World Cup qualifying games. Anguilla lost 6–0, making this the same as the last two aggregate scores for the teams. On 31 March 2021, they faced Barbados at [[Félix Sánchez Olympic Stadium|Estadio Olímpico Félix Sánchez]] in [[Santo Domingo]], Anguilla lost to a late 1–0 goal by [[Emile Saimovici]]. Then, on 2 June 2021 they lost 3–0 to Dominica at [[Félix Sánchez Olympic Stadium|Estadio Olímpico Félix Sánchez]] in [[Santo Domingo]]. And on 6 July, at [[Estadio Nacional de Panamá]] in [[Panama City]], Anguilla suffered a massive 13–0 defeat. They ended of round 1 with 0 points, 0 goals, and 23 goals against.

===2026 World Cup qualification===
At the commencement of [[2026 FIFA World Cup]] qualification, Anguilla advanced beyond the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round of qualifying]] for the first time in their history after beating [[Turks and Caicos Islands national football team|Turks and Caicos Islands]] 1–1 on aggregate after penalties.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/concacaf-british-virgin-islands-anguilla-history-qualification-football|title=British Virgin Islands and Anguilla progress for the first time|publisher=[[FIFA]]|date=27 March 2024|access-date=8 June 2024|archive-date=8 June 2024|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20240608061321/https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/concacaf-british-virgin-islands-anguilla-history-qualification-football|url-status=live}}</ref>

In the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round|second round]], they were drawn into Group F with [[Suriname national football team|Suriname]], [[El Salvador national football team|El Salvador]], [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]] and [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines national football team|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines]].

===Overall World Cup qualification record===
The pair of shutouts against Nicaragua in March 2015 extended Anguilla's scoreless run in World Cup qualification to eight matches, encompassing three World Cups over an eleven-year period. The goals Anguilla scored in March 2000 against the Bahamas in each leg of their first World Cup qualifying appearance remain their only two goals, with 41 goals conceded, no wins, one draw and nine losses from their ten World Cup qualifying matches to date.<ref>{{cite web|title=Seven in, seven out in CONCACAF&nbsp;— FIFA.com|url=https://www.fifa.com/worldcup/news/y=2015/m=3/news=wednesday-seven-in-seven-out-in-concacaf-2581120.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150401181812/http://www.fifa.com//worldcup/news/y=2015/m=3/news=wednesday-seven-in-seven-out-in-concacaf-2581120.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=1 April 2015|website=FIFA.com|access-date=9 July 2015}}</ref>

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Anguilla national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[Exhibition games|Unofficial Friendly]]
|date       = 31 May
|time       = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|GRN}}
|score      = 2–0
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.facebook.com/GrenadaFA/posts/pfbid0hHgijyMQx2DbdgsZiuKYgGFB2LfHVs3UkmkfGbNZ6tTLTWEvDuNjNYhHdPKT2mG9l
|goals1     =
*[[Keishean Francois]] {{goal|17}}
*[[Johnathan Williams (footballer)|Johnathan Williams]] {{goal|53}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[St. George's, Grenada|St. George's]], Grenada
|stadium    = [[Kirani James Athletic Stadium]]
|attendance =
|referee    = 
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 7 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|AIA}}
|score      = 0–3
|team2      = {{fb|SLV}}
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
* [[Santos Ortiz|Ortiz]] {{goal|30}}
* [[Brayan Gil|Gil]] {{goal|45+5}}
* [[Elvin Alvarado|Alvarado]] {{goal|77}}
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017772
|stadium    = [[Raymond E. Guishard Technical Centre]]
|location    = [[The Valley, Anguilla|The Valley]], Anguilla
|attendance =
|referee    = [[Filip Dujic]] ([[Canadian Soccer Association|Canada]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
|date       = 8 November
|time       = 18:30
|team1      = [[United Superstars]] {{flagicon|SMA}}
|score      = 0–5 
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1BeJADazcs/
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
*[[Mekhi Connor|M. Connor]] {{goal}} 
*[[Raynel Martin|Martin]] {{goal}} 
*[[Germain Hughes|Hughes]] {{goal}} 
*[[Timarqus Connor|T. Connor]] {{goal}} 
*[[Kemari Gumbs|Gumbs]] {{goal}} 
|location   = [[Philipsburg, Sint Maarten|Philipsburg]], Sint Maarten
|stadium    = [[Raoul Illidge Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =W 
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
|date       = 9 November
|time       = 18:00
|team1      = {{fb-rt|MAF}}
|score      = 1–2 
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1BeJADazcs/
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
*[[Aedan Scipio|Scipio]] {{goal}} 
*[[Jordan Deans|Deans]] {{goal}} 
|location   = [[Quartier-d'Orleans]], Saint Martin
|stadium    = [[Stade Thelbert Carti]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =W 
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
|score      = 1–2
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.concacaf.com/concacaf-series/news/bellechasse-oughterson-score-braces-to-open-concacaf-series/
|goals1     =
*[[William Bayles (footballer)|Bayles]] {{goal|52|pen.}}
|goals2     =
*[[Mekhi Connor|Connor]] {{goal|11}}
*[[Tarique Jackson|Jackson]] {{goal|87}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Micah Erskine ([[Guyana Football Federation|Guyana]])
|result     = W
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 4–0
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1FswyUJNod/?mibextid=wwXIfr
|goals1     =
*[[Gunnar Studenhofft|Studenhofft]] {{goal|16|pen.|58}}
*[[Zachary Scott (footballer)|Scott]] {{goal|28}}
*[[Owens Ebanks|O. Ebanks]] {{goal|84}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Amaury Majors]] ([[Bermuda Football Association|Bermuda]])
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 26 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
|score      = 1–3
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-26/bahamas-vs-anguilla/4095365
|goals1     =
*[[Robert Holcombe (footballer)|Holcombe]] {{goal|15}}
|goals2     =
*[[Jan-Willem Tesselaar|Tesselaar]] {{goal|43||52|pen.}}
*[[Jonathan Guishard|Guishard]] {{goal|83}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Renlee Napoleon]] ([[Saint Lucia Football Association|Saint Lucia]])
|result     = W
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|VGB}}
|score      = 4–0
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-29/british-virgin-islands-vs-anguilla/4095372
|goals1     = *[[Tyler Forbes (footballer, born 2002)|T. Forbes]] {{goal|5||39}}
*[[Luka Chalwell|Chalwell]] {{goal|32|pen.}}
*[[Johari Lacey|Lacey]] {{goal|78}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Sergio Rozenhout ([[Surinamese Football Association|Suriname]])
|result     = L
}}

==Coaching history==

[[File:Scott Cooper 20180303 (cropped).jpg|thumb|200px|[[Scott Cooper (football manager)|Scott Cooper]] managed the national football team of Anguilla in the 2000s]]

{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
*{{Flagicon|ENG}} Les Strong (1991–1994)
*{{Flagicon|ENG}} [[Clifton Livingston]] (2000)
*{{Flagicon|ENG}} [[Scott Cooper (football manager)|Scott Cooper]] (2002)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} [[Vernon Hodge]] (2003–2004)
*{{Flagicon|ENG}} [[Benjamin Davies (football manager)|Benjamin Davies]] (2004)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} [[Vernon Hodge]] (2004–2007)
*{{Flagicon|ENG}} [[Kerthney Carty]] (2008)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} Colin Johnson (2008–2009)
*{{Flagicon|ENG}} [[Scott Cooper (football manager)|Scott Cooper]] (2010)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} Colin Johnson (2010–2015)
*{{Flagicon|POL}} {{Flagicon|USA}} [[Richard Orlowski]] (2015)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} Leon Jeffers (2016)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} Romare Kelsick (2016–2018)
*{{flagicon|AIA}} Nigel Connor (2018–2020)
*{{Flagicon|TRI}} [[Stern John]] (2020–2022)
*{{Flagicon|AIA}} Nigel Connor (2022–2024)
*{{Flagicon|TRI}} [[Keith Jeffrey]] (2024–Present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series|2026 CONCACAF Series]] matches against [[Bahamas national football team|Bahamas]] and [[Cayman Islands national football team|Cayman Islands]] on 26 and 29 March 2026.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.facebook.com/photo.php?fbid=1574287071216359&set=pb.100059052445299.-2207520000&type=3|title=CONCACAF Friendly Series-Anguilla Senior National Football Team|publisher= Anguilla Football Association|date=22 March 2026|access-date=20 May 2026}}</ref>

<!-- PLEASE UPDATE CURRENT SQUAD AND RECENT CALL-UPS TOGETHER TO AVOID DUPLICATES. PLEASE DO NOT JUST UPDATE YOUR FAVORITE PLAYER. PLEASE ALWAYS CITE YOUR UPDATES. -->
<!-- SORT BY positions, squad numbers (if available), caps, goals, last name, first name -->
<!-- NO LIVE UPDATES, WAIT UNTIL MATCHES FINISH -->
''Caps and goals are updated as of 30 March 2026, after the match against [[Cayman Islands national football team|Cayman Islands]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Jelanie Lawrence]]|age={{bda|df=y|1983|8|26}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Doc's United FC|Doc's United]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Orliandry Curiel]]|age={{bda|df=y|2005|6|21}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kieron Lake-Bryan]]|age={{bda|df=y|2001|10|23}}|caps=18|goals=0|club=[[Northwood F.C.|Northwood]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Luke Paris]]|age={{bda|df=y|1994|11|11}}|caps=17|goals=1|club=[[Uxbridge F.C.|Uxbridge]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Alexander Fleming-Franco]]|age={{bda|df=y|2005|4|12}}|caps=13|goals=0|club=[[Doc's United FC|Doc's United]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nathaniel Owen]]|age={{bda|df=y|2008|1|25}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Eastleigh F.C.|Eastleigh]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sedu Bradshaw]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|11|13}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Lymers FC|Lymers]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Germain Hughes]]||other=[[Captain (association football)|captain]]|age={{bda|df=y|1996|11|15}}|caps=33|goals=1|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Aedan Scipio]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1990|9|3}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Javis Jones]]|age={{bda|df=y|2005|8|24}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Uprising FC|Uprising]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kayne Connor]]|age={{bda|df=y|2004|5|16}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Bedfont Sports F.C.|Bedfont Sports]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tjivari Leveret-Francisca]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2009|9|15}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Malachi Gumbs]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|6|3}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Diamond FC|Diamond]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jaheim Thompson]]|age={{bda|df=y|2007|10|6}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Oldham Athletic A.F.C.|Oldham Athletic U-18]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Yariel Fleming]]|age={{bda|df=y|1997|10|10}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jonathan Guishard]]|age={{bda|df=y|1996|7|2}}|caps=22|goals=2|club=[[Doc's United FC|Doc's United]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Timarqus Connor]]|age={{bda|df=y|2007|8|18}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Attackers FC|Attackers]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Tarique Jackson]]|age={{bda|df=y|2009|7|3}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jayvon Lloyd]]|age={{bda|df=y|2002|3|20}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Attackers FC]]|clubnat=AIA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jan-Willem Tesselaar]]|age={{bda|df=y|1997|10|21}}|caps=2|goals=2|club=[[AVV Swift]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have also been called up for the team in the last twelve months.
<!-- PLEASE NOTE PLAYERS STAY 12 MONTHS AND NOT LESS THAN THAT -->
<!-- Sorted by position, most recent call-up, caps, goals and last name. -->
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Shemor Browne Bailey]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2008|7|6}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[ALHCS Spartan FC|Spartans]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Micah Brooks (footballer)|Micah Brooks]]|age={{bda|df=y|2006|4|30}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Diamond FC|Diamond]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kion Lee]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1993|9|2}}|caps=25|goals=0|club=[[Attackers FC|Attackers]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Marley Ipinson-Fabien]]|age={{bda|df=y|2000|7|26}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Hillingdon Borough F.C.|Hillingdon Boro]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jalen Smeins]]|age={{bda|df=y|2002|8|29}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Diamond FC|Diamond]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Antoine Fleming]]|age={{bda|df=y|2000|10|7}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Uprising FC|Uprising]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Keante Brooks]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2007|2|26}}|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nicholas Loblack]]|age={{bda|df=y|1988|2|24}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[SWA Sharks FC]]|clubnat=TCA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Delani Francis]]|age={{bda|df=y|2006|1|24}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Uprising FC|Uprising]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nicholson Millington]]|age={{bda|df=y|2008|8|3}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Diamond FC|Diamond]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=Carlos Reyes|age={{bda|df=y|2002|9|18}}|caps=2|goals=0|club= [[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jared Smeins]]|age={{bda|df=y|2006|10|26}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Talladega College|Talladega Tornadoes]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jordan Deans]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1995|10|30}}|caps=9|goals=1|club=[[Uprising FC]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Antonio Fleming (footballer)|Antonio Fleming]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1996|8|19}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[New York Polet]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Varian Carty]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|6|3}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Huntingdon Hawks]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kian Duncan]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2000|5|26}}|caps=16|goals=0|club=[[Flackwell Heath FC|Flackwell Heath]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kevin Paul(footballer)|Kevin Paul]]|age={{bda|df=y|2006|1|23}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[ALHCS Spartan FC|Spartans]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Mekhi Connor]]|age={{bda|df=y|2008|1|14}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Roaring Lions FC|Roaring Lions]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kemari Gumbs]]|age={{bda|df=y|2008|3|10}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[ALHCS Spartan FC|Spartans]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jauron Gayle]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2004|3|4}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Doc's United FC|Doc's United]]|clubnat=AIA|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Lamar Carpenter]]|age={{bda|df=y|2004|1|23}}|caps=11|goals=3|club=[[Windsor F.C. (2011)|Windsor]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|SLV}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Calvin Morgan]]|age={{bda|df=y|1995|5|18}}|caps=14|goals=1|club=[[Wraysbury F.C.|Wraysbury]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|BVI}}; 30 April 2025}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{updated|22 May 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Anguilla |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/7/Anguilla.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=4 March 2022 |archive-date=28 February 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230228155211/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/7/2023/Anguilla.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Anguilla''.

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Germain Hughes]]'''
|33
|1
|2012–present
|-
|rowspan=2|2
|style="text-align:left;"|'''{{ill|Kion Lee|fr}}'''
|25
|0
|2012–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{ill|Ryan Liddie|es}}
|25
|0
|2000–2019
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Girdon Connor]]
|23
|4
|2000–2018
|-
|5
|style="text-align:left;"|'''{{ill|Jonathan Guishard|fr}}'''
|22
|2
|2014–present
|-
|rowspan=3|6
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Kevin Hawley]]
|18
|0
|2000–2016
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Kieron Lake-Bryan]]'''
|18
|0
|2022–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{ill|Adonijah Richardson|pl}}
|18
|1
|2006–2016
|-
|rowspan=2|9
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Luke Paris]]'''
|17
|1
|2019–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{ill|Leon Jeffers|arz|ليون چيفيرس}}
|17
|0
|2004–2012
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Richard O'Connor (football player)|Richard O'Connor]]
|5
|5
|{{#expr:5/5 round 2}}
|2000–2006
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Girdon Connor]]
|4
|23
|{{#expr:4/23 round 2}}
|2000–2018
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Lamar Carpenter]]'''
|3
|11
|{{#expr:3/11 round 2}}
|2021–present
|-
|rowspan=5|4
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Jan-Willem Tesselaar]]'''
|2
|3
|{{#expr:2/3 round 2}}
|2022–Present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{ill|Terrence Rogers|es}}
|2
|13
|{{#expr:2/13 round 2}}
|2000–2012
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''{{ill|Jonathan Guishard|fr}}'''
|2
|22
|{{#expr:2/22 round 2}}
|2014–present
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan=14|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record 
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=9|''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
|{{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]||colspan=9 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||0||2||2||5
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|2||0||1||1||0||6
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|2||0||0||2||0||16
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|2||0||0||2||0||6
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|2||0||0||2||0||8
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|4||0||0||4||0||23
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|6||0||2||4||1||22
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/7!!colspan=7|—
!20!!0!!3!!17!!3!!86
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] / [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
!rowspan=22|
!colspan=6|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]] to [[1989 CONCACAF Championship|1989]]||colspan=9|''Not a CONCACAF member''
|colspan=6|''Not a CONCACAF member''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]||colspan=9 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||1||1||1||7
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]
|2||0||0||2||0||2
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]
|2||0||0||2||2||6
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|3||0||0||3||1||12
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|3||0||0||3||1||35
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|2||1||0||1||5||4
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]||colspan=9 rowspan=10|''Did not qualify''
|3||0||0||3||5||18
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]
|2||0||0||2||2||6
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|3||1||0||2||4||8
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
|3||0||0||3||1||16
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|3||0||0||3||0||20
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|2||0||0||2||0||11
|-
|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|4||0||1||3||1||15
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|4||0||0||4||2||21
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|4||0||2||2||2||5
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|4||1||0||3||3||4
|-
!Total!!—!!0/16!!colspan=7|—
!46!!3!!4!!39!!30!!192
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
!colspan=22|[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
!colspan=11|League phase
!rowspan=8|
!colspan=10|Final phase 
|-
!Season
!{{Tooltip|Div.|Division}}
!Group
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/Relegation}}
!Finals
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}} 
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|13th||4||0||0||4||2||21||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|9th||4||0||2||2||2||5||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|13th||4||0||0||4||0||19||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|6th||4||1||0||3||3||4||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League|2026–27]]
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]||colspan="9"|''To be determined''
|[[2027 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2027]]
|-
!colspan=4|Total!!16!!1!!2!!13!!7!!49!!—
!Total!!colspan=9|—
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb|GUA}} 10–0 {{fb-rt|AIA}}<br>(5 September 2019; [[Guatemala City]], Guatemala)
|-
!Biggest win
|{{fb-rt|AIA}} 2–0 {{fb|TCA}}<br>(4 September 2024; [[Providenciales]], Turks and Caicos Islands)
|-
!Biggest defeat
|{{fb|GUA}} 10–0 {{fb-rt|AIA}}<br>(5 September 2019; [[Guatemala City]], Guatemala)
|-
!Best result
|6th – League C ([[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2024–25]])
|-
!Worst result
|13th – League C ([[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2019–20]], [[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2023–24]])
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CFU Championship]] / [[Caribbean Cup]] record
!rowspan=22|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1978 CFU Championship|1978]] to [[1988 CFU Championship|1988]]||colspan=8|''Not a CFU member''
|colspan=6|''Not a CFU member''
|-
|[[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]] and [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''||colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]||colspan=8 rowspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||1||1||1||7
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]
|2||0||0||2||0||8
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|2||0||0||2||0||2
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
|2||0||0||2||0||11
|-
|{{flagicon|CAY}} {{flagicon|JAM}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
|2||0||0||2||2||6
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]
|2||0||0||2||0||12
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]
|3||0||0||3||1||12
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
|3||0||0||3||1||35
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2||1||0||1||5||4
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]||colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|3||0||0||3||5||18
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]
|2||0||0||2||2||6
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]
|3||1||0||2||4||8
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]
|3||0||0||3||1||16
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
|3||0||0||3||0||20
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
|2||0||0||2||0||11
|-
!Total!!—!!0/15!!colspan=7|—
!36!!2!!1!!33!!21!!176
|}

==Head-to-head record==
{{#lst:Anguilla national football team results|Record by opponent}}

==Historical kits==
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _anguilla1516h
| pattern_b   = _anguilla1516h
| pattern_ra  = _anguilla1516h
| pattern_sh  = _anguilla1516h
| pattern_so  = _anguilla1516h
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = 
| title     = 2000-10s Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _aia18a
| pattern_b   = _aia18a
| pattern_ra  = _aia18a
| pattern_sh  = _aia18a
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = 0000FF
| title     = 2000-10s Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _aia18h
| pattern_b   = _aia18h
| pattern_ra  = _aia18h
| pattern_sh  = _aia18h
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title      = 2014 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _AIA2014THIRD
| pattern_b   = _AIA2014THIRD
| pattern_ra  = _AIA2014THIRD
| pattern_sh  = _AIA2014THIRD
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title     = 2014 Third
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _AIA2018H
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _shorts
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = FFFFFF
| body        = 
| rightarm    = FF6600
| shorts      = FF6600
| socks       = FF6600
| title      = 2018 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _AIA2018A
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _shorts
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = FF6600
| body        = 
| rightarm    = FF6600
| shorts      = 14ACE8
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title      = 2018 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _AIA2018THIRD
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _shorts
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = FFFFFF
| body        = 
| rightarm    = FFFFFF
| shorts      = 
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title      = 2018 Third
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _aia22h 
| pattern_b   = _aia22h 
| pattern_ra  = _aia22h 
| pattern_sh  = _aia22h 
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = EC5634
| title       = 2021 Home
}}
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _aia21h
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _shorts
| pattern_so  = _aia21h
| leftarm     = FFFFFF
| body        = 
| rightarm    = FFFFFF
| shorts      = 15B1C7
| socks       = 
| title       = 2021 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _AIA2021THIRD
| pattern_b   = _AIA2021THIRD
| pattern_ra  = _AIA2021THIRD
| pattern_sh  = _shorts
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 1F7FD5
| socks       = 0D0C6B
| title       = 2021 Third
}}
|}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
*[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h6d5orPJNgs Antigua & Barbuda&nbsp;– Anguilla, Digicel Caribbean Cup 2007, YouTube]
*[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pFmL9K4ABhQ Barbados&nbsp;– Anguilla, Digicel Caribbean Cup 2007, YouTube]
*[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ge2CTl8OpTQ El Salvador&nbsp;– Anguilla 12–0, 2008-02-06, 2010 WCQ, YouTube]
*[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9sAOKX4aapk Anguilla&nbsp;– El Salvador 0–4, 2008-03-26, 2010 WCQ, YouTube]

{{Anguilla national football team}}
{{Football in Anguilla}}
{{UK National Football teams}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Anguilla}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Anguilla National Football Team}}
[[Category:Anguilla national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
